title: pandanus tectorius var. drolletianus
intro: Pandanus tectorius var. drolletianus is a lesser-known variety of the Pandanus tectorius plant, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant is a type of screwpine, known for its unique, spiraling leaves and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Pandanus tectorius var. drolletianus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to take advantage of its health benefits, including reducing fever, improving digestion, and supporting immune function.
